slides.title: Executive summary
slides.body: 4 grounded action(s) span contract redlines, privacy transfer controls, incident-response commitments and evidence closure. Immediate focus: Set up auto-renewal calendar alerts; Draft SCC Appendix for data residency.
bullets: Draft SCC Appendix for data residency
